text: This article is based on a dissertation for the Master’s degree in Heritage and Cultural Tourism. It explores literary tourism as a genre of heritage tourism and considers the potential for the growth of literary tourism in South Africa. The research was conducted in the Department of Historical and Heritage Studies at the University of Pretoria and the full dissertation is available on the UP’s institutional repository: http://hdl.handle.net/2263/29043.
headline: Fully Human Written
